name: Apple Crunch Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Wash and core apples. Shred unpeeled apples.
1 Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon into a mixing bowl.
2 Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until fine crumbs form.
3 Combine egg and milk. Add to dry ingredients all at once, stirring just enough to moisten.
4 Stir in apples. Spoon batter into paper-lined 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
5 Sprinkle with nut crunch topping.
6 Bake in a 375 degree oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
NUT CRUNCH TOPPING:
Mix together 1/4 cup Brown Sugar (Packed), 1/4 cup Chopped Pecans, and 1/2 teaspoon Ground Cinnamon in a small bowl.
